mapper.sql: select o.order_id, o.order_no, o.buyer_id, o.seller_id, o.product_id, o.price, o.status, o.trade_method, o.address, o.meeting_place, o.pay_time, o.create_time, o.update_time, p.title as product_title, p.images as product_images, buyer.nickname as buyer_name, seller.nickname as seller_name from tb_order o left join tb_product p on o.product_id = p.product_id left join tb_user buyer on o.buyer_id = buyer.user_id left join tb_user seller on o.seller_id = seller.user_id

select o.order_id, o.order_no, o.buyer_id, o.seller_id, o.product_id, o.price, o.status, o.trade_method, o.address, o.meeting_place, o.pay_time, o.create_time, o.update_time, p.title as product_title, p.images as product_images, p.product_condition, c.name as category_name, seller.phone as seller_phone, buyer.nickname as buyer_name, seller.nickname as seller_name from tb_order o left join tb_product p on o.product_id = p.product_id left join tb_category c on p.category_id = c.category_id left join tb_user buyer on o.buyer_id = buyer.user_id left join tb_user seller on o.seller_id = seller.user_id
mapper.select: select count(*) from tb_order where date(create_time) = curdate()
select date(create_time) as date, count(*) as count from tb_order where create_time >= date_sub(curdate(), interval 6 day) group by date(create_time) order by date
